tasks.label: Neon Migration
tasks.command: npx prisma generate && npx prisma migrate dev --name init 2>&1

tasks.label: Check Neon Status
tasks.command: npx prisma migrate status 2>&1 && echo '---' && node -e "require('dotenv/config'); const { neon } = require('@neondatabase/serverless'); const sql = neon(process.env.DATABASE_URL); sql('SELECT COUNT(*) as c FROM \"Student\"').then(r => console.log('Connected! Students:', r[0].c)).catch(e => console.log('FAIL:', e.message));"

tasks.label: Push to GitHub
tasks.command: git add -A && git commit -m 'Switch to Neon PostgreSQL - works locally and on Vercel' && git push

tasks.label: Restart Dev Server
tasks.command: pkill -f 'next dev' 2>/dev/null; sleep 1; npm run dev

tasks.label: Verify Admin Page
tasks.command: curl -s http://localhost:3000/admin | grep -o 'Database Connection Error\|Admin Dashboard\|4Achievers'

tasks.label: Restart Dev Server 2
tasks.command: pkill -f 'next dev' 2>/dev/null; sleep 1; npm run dev

tasks.label: Check Error Detail
tasks.command: sleep 3 && curl -s http://localhost:3000/admin | grep -o 'DATABASE_URL.*missing\|No database host\|Admin Dashboard – 4Achievers' | head -3

tasks.label: Restart Dev Final
tasks.command: pkill -f 'next dev' 2>/dev/null; sleep 2; npm run dev

tasks.label: Restart Dev Final 2
tasks.command: pkill -f 'next dev' 2>/dev/null; sleep 2; npm run dev

tasks.label: Clean Restart
tasks.command: pkill -f 'next dev' 2>/dev/null; sleep 1; rm -rf .next && npm run dev

tasks.label: Deep Check
tasks.command: sleep 5 && curl -s http://localhost:3000/admin | grep -o 'DATABASE_URL.*not set\|No database host\|Total Students\|Stats'

tasks.label: Extract Error
tasks.command: curl -s http://localhost:3000/admin | python3 -c "import sys,re; html=sys.stdin.read(); m=re.search(r'DATABASE_URL[^<\\\\"]{0,200}', html); print(m.group(0) if m else 'not found')"

tasks.label: Check Package Versions
tasks.command: cat node_modules/@neondatabase/serverless/package.json | python3 -c "import sys,json; p=json.load(sys.stdin); print('neon version:', p['version'])" && cat node_modules/@prisma/adapter-neon/package.json | python3 -c "import sys,json; p=json.load(sys.stdin); print('adapter version:', p['version'])"

tasks.label: Install pg adapter
tasks.command: npm install @prisma/adapter-pg pg && npm install --save-dev @types/pg 2>&1 | tail -3

tasks.label: Clean Restart Final
tasks.command: pkill -f 'next dev' 2>/dev/null; sleep 1; rm -rf .next && npm run dev

tasks.label: Build Check and Push
tasks.command: npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 && git add -A && git commit -m 'Fix DB: use @prisma/adapter-pg with Neon PostgreSQL URL' && git push

tasks.label: Build and Push
tasks.command: npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 && git add -A && git commit -m 'Fix DB: use @prisma/adapter-pg with Neon PostgreSQL URL' && git push

tasks.label: Push to GitHub
tasks.command: git add -A && git commit -m 'Add edit and delete receipt functionality' && git push
